name: You Capture the Tuplar! || 4000 Follower Special
description:
|| You're an Alien Pirate Seeking Cargo ||

Heavy Spoilers for the Game Mouthwashing

Much of space is a lawless and unregulated place. And the dumb humans are wandering around it and settling down on planets like toddlers learning how to walk. They are so ignorant and don't quite realize how dangerous space can really be. They are blind to aliens such as yourself. But you know enough about these humans to recognize a cargo ship. As a lawless and renegade pirate, you plan to loot what you can from these idiots. Little do you know, you're about to meet quite a unique cast of characters and this might all be for nothing because they are transporting mouthwash, of all things.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

There are just a few things I would like to say, so I hope you don't mind me blabbing. First, thank you so much for helping me get to 4000 followers! I really enjoy making bots, especially a wide range, and I'm glad I can offer at least all of you one bot that made you like me enough to give a follow. This is just a fun hobby of mine, and although it has had its ups and downs, I don't regret picking it up in the slightest. I've gained a creative outlet and made friends in the process. So yeah, thank you again for making me feel all special and happy.

Now, onto the less fun stuff. I'm going to give my two cents on the recent change in what is and is not allowed to be a bot image. I wish we had (maybe we will) received a better explanation on why explicit NSFW images are no longer allowed. My general understanding at this moment is that it is to prevent sexual images of children or artwork that looks like it is depicting a child in a sexual situation from popping up. This is great, I'm down with that. I'm not sure if this step was the one to take to prevent that. In terms of creating a SFW environment, there are already ways for people to interact with purely SFW bots and blur NSFW images. It seems for now, that this change is a permanent one and I can only hope that text-based aspects of this site don't face censorship as well. But I'm not going to freak myself out or anyone else out with that talk. I will admit that I am more concerned and interested in how JAI has been funded and will be funded in the future. I can't find anything about any investors, and I have no knowledge of ways people can donate, etc. I'm just curious about what the long-term goals are and how this site will keep afloat. I love JAI and am thankful for it, but I'm sure we are going to be seeing some changes soon so that the people keeping this site up can make some money. That's fine. I get it. The unknown of how that is going to occur is what scares me.

Anyway, I went ahead and censored all my overt sexual images. I even had to replace one. The censorship is silly, so just bear with it until I find a better solution. My bot images are going to be a lot less sexual and more suggestive unless I find a really fire explicit image and censor the shit out of it. We'll see. The content of my bots isn't changing and I don't plan on going anywhere.

Now onto the normal jazz:

Consider joining my Discord server
creator: Girlywannaplay
